text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O is training to do multiple
1,200-meter races in quick succession. Day after
day, she does her best in her training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she doesn't want to make sprinting all
she's known for. I might not be able to convince
her to do more sprints after this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk the academy grounds, mulling this over
when...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Good for you, Flower! The teacher said you were
quick to take action!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: It's only because you helped me, Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I think it would have taken me a while to carry
five books by myself.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your help.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to thank me! It's only natural
things should speed up with me around!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Bakushin O! Do you remember what we have
planned for tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course I do! You wanted to learn how best to
do a starting dash, right?

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: I'm glad you do. Thanks in advance.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Wait, isn't it about time for the celebrations?
Everyone's been looking for you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Whoa! It's already this late?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll be there at once! Flower, you're coming with
me!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: P-please... wait just one moment!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For there to be a celebration, something good
must've happened to Sakura Bakushin O. I decide
to see what the fuss is about.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm pleased to announce...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I, Sakura Bakushin O, have shortened my record
time for speed-changing out of my uniform and
into my tracksuit by five seconds!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Speed-changing...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all for gathering here today to
celebrate this momentous occasion!

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: Congratulations! Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Thank you, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What do you think, Flower? I'm fast with my legs and my clothes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I also hold the record for taking the quickest
early lunch! Although it's about time I revisit that
one!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... That's quite the achievement!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
Lately you've been way more in the zone. Like
your speed is really getting up there.

text_block_list.name: Classmate C
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! The homeroom teacher said something
about that too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh! What did they say?

text_block_list.name: Classmate C
text_block_list.text:
They said they were thankful you brought the
documents to them so quickly. Also that it'd be
even better if they came in a bit neater too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Haha, oh Teacher, you! You don't have to compliment me that much!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I feel so honored as class representative!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Your speed is the only thing about you we
know we can rely on. We're counting on you,
Class Rep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: They're counting on me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reasons for the celebrations give me a
chuckle, but I do get to see Sakura Bakushin O be
doted on by her classmates.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later on while walking the grounds, I find Sakura
Bakushin O and Nishino Flower together,
seemingly done with the celebrations.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Phew, I sure was praised a lot! As is par for the course for the ideal class representative!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah ha ha...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I noticed that everyone really admires you,
Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Being admired is basically my job as
class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm new and improved! Here stands the class
representative to rule all class representatives!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to my trainer's spot-on training methods,
I've been on a roll!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you sure have.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Right! I want to run long distance, so I'm working
on acing three sprints!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, isn't that... just doing sprints over and over?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Was that the sound of someone's heart
leaping out their chest right now?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, running three sprints also makes for a
wonderful long-distance run. Perhaps it's still too
early for you to comprehend, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: R-right...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I can't go wrong if I'm following my trainer's
advice!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You know, since training with them, I've only
been asked for more and more favors.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My trainer will definitely make my dream come
true!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I guess you really trust your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Of course I do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect to hear Sakura Bakushin O's
heartfelt feelings like this. Her words light a fire in
me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's only right to guide her properly now I know
she trusts me. I'll lead her down a Bakushin Road
where she can truly shine!
